Dried Shit Weed.Description: Allows dehydration of Shit Weed. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Blue Dream.Description: Allows dehydration of Blue Dream. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Cookies and Cream.Description: Allows dehydration of Cookies and Cream. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Green Dream.Description: Allows dehydration of Green Dream. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Purple Haze.Description: Allows dehydration of Purple Haze. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Orange Sherbert.Description: Allows dehydration of Orange Sherbert. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Northern Lights.Description: Allows dehydration of Northern Lights. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried OG Kush.Description: Allows dehydration of OG Kush. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Super Silver.Description: Allows dehydration of Super Silver. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Sour Diesel.Description: Allows dehydration of Sour Diesel. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried Strawberry Cough.Description: Allows dehydration of Strawberry Cough. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Dried White Widow.Description: Allows dehydration of White Widow. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Hemp.Description: Allows processing of Hemp on various machines. When false, disables processing this item.

Tobacco.Description: Allows dehydration of Tobacco. When false, disables processing this item on the Dehydrator.

Rolling Machine.Description: Allows automatic crafting of smokables that respects ingredient quality.
